svg.title: AI security covers the full path from input to logs
svg.desc: D2 generated diagram for AI security covers the full path from input to logs
svg.text: AI security covers the full path from input to logs
Control data, permissions, tools, output handling, log retention, and supply chain, not just prompts.

g.text: Key point: prompt separation alone is not enough.

text.tspan: 2. Server-side schema, argument, and permission validation
3. Sensitive data redaction and egress blocking
4. Red team, regression tests, incident review
7. Supply-chain review and vendor due diligence
